theme_description: Enterprise ecosystem and integration hub. Bento grid and glassmorphism for integrations and agencies, lead capture, and partner programs.

index.name: Ecosystem home
index.description: Bento grid for featured integrations and solution partners, plus partner CTA

description.label: Home intro
description.info: Rich text shown in the hero glass card

channel.name: Partner directory
channel.description: Filter by type, region, and tier

intro.label: Directory intro
intro.info: Short text shown under the title

logo_image_url.label: Logo image
logo_image_url.info: Hero and cards; transparent PNG/SVG recommended

partner_type.label: Partner type
partner_type.info: Options come from General settings → Partner type options (global).

region.label: Region
region.info: Options come from General settings → Partner region options (global); used for directory filters.

partner_tier.label: Tier
partner_tier.info: Options come from General settings → Partner tier options (global).

action_label.label: Primary CTA label
action_label.info: Defaults by partner type if empty

static_dashboard.name: Partner portal (preview)
static_dashboard.description: Sample partner portal home after sign-in: hero demo image and feature cards

partner_lead_email.label: Partner lead inbox email
partner_lead_email.info: Become-a-partner form opens a mailto to this address when set; otherwise shows a copyable summary

partner_type.label: Partner type options (global)
partner_type.info:
One value per line (e.g. Technology & Integration); that string is both label and stored value. In Liquid, split with newline_to_br | split: '
'. Home featured integrations use line 1; solution partners use line 2; directory filters and page selects follow the same list.

partner_region.label: Partner region options (global)
partner_region.info:
One region name per line (e.g. APAC). Split in Liquid with newline_to_br | split: '
'; used on partner pages and directory filters.

partner_tier.label: Partner tier options (global)
partner_tier.info:
One tier name per line (e.g. Gold). Split in Liquid with newline_to_br | split: '
'; used on partner pages and directory filters.

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used for analytics, customer service bot, etc.

header_menu_html.label: Insert HTML in Top Navigation Area
header_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
header_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used for company website navigation links

footer_menu_html.label: Insert HTML in Footer Area
footer_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
footer_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used for external navigation links, friend links, SEO optimization links, etc.

weixin_app_id.label: Developer ID (AppID)
weixin_app_id.info: WeChat official account/setting and development/development interface management

weixin_enabled.label: Do you want to enable WeChat sharing
weixin_enabled.info: Provide the ability to share site pages on WeChat

weixin_debug.label: Do you want to enable debug prompt
weixin_debug.info: Please only enable this option during the configuration phase
